name: Cholera
description: Infectious disease caused by Vibrio cholerae, characterized by watery diarrhea and rapid dehydration.

name: Typhoid fever
description: Infection caused by Salmonella typhi, transmitted via contaminated food/water, causes fever and abdominal pain.

name: Fever, not elsewhere classified
description: Elevated body temperature without clear cause, may be associated with infection or inflammation.
category: R00-R99 Symptoms, signs, and abnormal clinical and laboratory findings
